title: Reject transport and provider leakage from LEDGER contracts
preconditions: A published Tally binary exposes every LEDGER schema, help document, stable error, and optional guidance manifest.
steps: Enumerate the operation registry and scan serialized schemas, examples, errors, diagnostics, manifests, and persisted evidence canaries for forbidden transport concepts and raw source payloads.
expected: The public and durable LEDGER contract contains only allowlisted provider-neutral evidence; AgentMail, MIME, mailbox, sender, recipient, WhatsApp, delivery, retry, full identifiers, and payload serialization are absent.
